mvw.input_scale: bytes 仓库默认测试集，单 job 构建 + 单线程测试

environment.methodology: tutorial.md one-pass profiling; process-tree RSS peak (monitor_tree.sh), whole tree not single process; MVW actually run; multi-thread/multi-process peak included.

static_triage.notes: Rust bytes library; no GPU requirement; build/test mainly consume CPU, RAM, and disk.

peaks_observed.cpu_utilization_summary: build moderate-high (cargo compile), run moderate (unit/doc/integration tests)

min_hardware.summary: 2 vCPU / 2 GB RAM / 1 GB disk, no GPU. Raw process-tree peaks: build 0.2388 GB, run 0.1402 GB, disk 0.1822 GB.
